channel.title: Agentic Systems on Sange Mehrab
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic Systems on Sange Mehrab

item.title: Karpathy autoresearch
item.description:
Karpathy Autoresearch Explained

Introduction

This section explains Karpathy’s autoresearch as a practical search loop rather than a new text-decoding algorithm. The core idea is that an autoregressive language model proposes changes to code, hyperparameters, or architecture choices; a fixed evaluator runs the experiment; and the system keeps only changes that improve the measured result. In that sense, autoresearch is closer to stochastic local search / hill-climbing over executable artifacts than to beam search, contrastive decoding, or ordinary text generation.
